issues.message: Legacy cut_hole node 'n3' uses axis='Y' with 2D position_mm. The Z coordinate is ambiguous and will default to the bounding-box midplane. Use cut_hole_v2 with target_face + center_uv_mm for explicit semantics.

Legacy cut_hole node 'n4' uses axis='Y' with 2D position_mm. The Z coordinate is ambiguous and will default to the bounding-box midplane. Use cut_hole_v2 with target_face + center_uv_mm for explicit semantics.

Legacy cut_hole node 'n5' uses axis='X' with 2D position_mm. The Z coordinate is ambiguous and will default to the bounding-box midplane. Use cut_hole_v2 with target_face + center_uv_mm for explicit semantics.
